specific_question: How many key operational metrics will Elexion Automotive collect from each of its production lines using IoT sensors and digital twins in Q1 2026?
answer: Internal Elexion Automotive analytics projections indicate that each production line will collect approximately 1,500 real-time metrics from IoT sensors and digital twins, covering equipment performance, cycle times, and anomaly detection.
dr_question: How can Elexion Automotive use real-time data from IoT sensors embedded in vehicles and manufacturing equipment, combined with digital engineering-enabled digital twins, to enhance predictive maintenance and minimize downtime in production lines by the end of 2025?
